name: io.github.RekklesNA/proxmox-mcp-plus
title: ProxmoxMCP-Plus
description: Enhanced Proxmox MCP server for managing Proxmox VE nodes, VMs, LXCs, snapshots, backups, ISOs, and related operational workflows.

environmentVariables.name: PROXMOX_HOST
environmentVariables.description: Hostname or IP address of the Proxmox VE API endpoint.

environmentVariables.name: PROXMOX_USER
environmentVariables.description: Proxmox username with realm, for example root@pam.

environmentVariables.name: PROXMOX_TOKEN_NAME
environmentVariables.description: Name of the Proxmox API token.

environmentVariables.name: PROXMOX_TOKEN_VALUE
environmentVariables.description: Secret value of the Proxmox API token.

environmentVariables.name: PROXMOX_VERIFY_SSL
environmentVariables.description: Set to true to verify TLS certificates, or false for self-signed lab environments.

environmentVariables.name: PROXMOX_SERVICE
environmentVariables.description: Proxmox service type. Defaults to PVE.

environmentVariables.name: LOG_LEVEL
environmentVariables.description: Server log verbosity. Defaults to INFO.
